title: SOC Lab — RDP Attack Detection
description: Simulated full attack lifecycle in a SOC homelab: RDP brute-force, privilege persistence, PowerShell abuse, containment, and custom Splunk detection engineering using Sysmon telemetry.

title: TCP/IP Attack Lab
description: Hands-on TCP/IP security lab demonstrating SYN flooding, TCP reset attacks, session hijacking, and reverse shell exploitation using Python and Scapy.

title: VPay
description: A demo that shows a voice-driven payment flow. The browser captures speech and simulates a payment response.
